---
title: "diabetes modeling korea 2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}


library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(rriskDistributions)
```

```{r}
# Loading Danish inputs: sex, LOD, BPS percentiles, and diabetes incidence
# Fitting a lognormal distribution from Danish percentiles

df <- read_excel("diabetes work china-kopi.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(
    meanlog_dk = log(p_50),
    sdlog_dk = (log(p_75) - log(p_25)) / (qnorm(0.75) - qnorm(0.25))
  )
```

```{r}
# Supplementary Table S6: diabetes ORs among participants with BPS > LOD

OR_t2  <- 1.73
LCL_t2 <- 1.00
UCL_t2 <- 2.98

OR_t3  <- 2.13
LCL_t3 <- 1.29
UCL_t3 <- 3.50

# Convert 95% CI to log-scale SE
se_t2 <- (log(UCL_t2) - log(LCL_t2)) / (2 * 1.96)
se_t3 <- (log(UCL_t3) - log(LCL_t3)) / (2 * 1.96)
```

```{r}
# Supplementary Table S1: Korean detectable BPS distribution (> LOD)
# Using p25, p50, and p75 to fit a lognormal distribution

fit_kor <- get.lnorm.par(
  p = c(0.25, 0.50, 0.75),
  q = c(0.029, 0.049, 0.104),
  show.output = FALSE,
  plot = FALSE
)

meanlog_kor <- unname(fit_kor["meanlog"])
sdlog_kor   <- unname(fit_kor["sdlog"])

# Tertile cutpoints among detectable Korean values
cut1 <- qlnorm(1/3, meanlog = meanlog_kor, sdlog = sdlog_kor)
cut2 <- qlnorm(2/3, meanlog = meanlog_kor, sdlog = sdlog_kor)

cut1
cut2
```

```{r}
# Median age at onset of type 2 diabetes in Denmark
age_m <- 62.1
age_f <- 64.6

# Life expectancy in Denmark
life_m <- 78.8
life_f <- 82.8

# Estimated duration
D_m <- life_m - age_m
D_f <- life_f - age_f

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    D_years = case_when(
      str_detect(group, "^Male") ~ D_m,
      str_detect(group, "^Female") ~ D_f,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```

```{r}
# Deaths and YLL from GBD for Denmark, type 2 diabetes
deaths_f <- 566.89
deaths_m <- 715.34

yll_f <- 7837.82
yll_m <- 12702.54

# Standard expected years of life lost per death
seyll_f <- yll_f / deaths_f
seyll_m <- yll_m / deaths_m

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    deaths = case_when(
      str_detect(group, "^Female") ~ deaths_f,
      str_detect(group, "^Male") ~ deaths_m,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    seyll = case_when(
      str_detect(group, "^Female") ~ seyll_f,
      str_detect(group, "^Male") ~ seyll_m,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```

```{r}
# Uncomplicated diabetes mellitus type 2
DW_mode <- 0.049011415
DW_min  <- 0.0311213425
DW_max  <- 0.072092547
```

```{r}
# PERT distribution for disability weight uncertainty
rpert <- function(n, min, mode, max) {
  alpha <- 1 + 4 * (mode - min) / (max - min)
  beta  <- 1 + 4 * (max - mode) / (max - min)
  min + rbeta(n, alpha, beta) * (max - min)
}
```

```{r}
run_mc_row_daly_korea <- function(i_diabetes, meanlog_dk, sdlog_dk, lod_dk,
                                  D_years, deaths, seyll,
                                  DW_min, DW_mode, DW_max,
                                  OR_t2, OR_t3, se_t2, se_t3,
                                  cut1, cut2,
                                  nsim = 10000,
                                  baseline_uncertainty = FALSE) {

  # Simulate Danish BPS exposure
  X <- rlnorm(nsim, meanlog = meanlog_dk, sdlog = sdlog_dk)

  # Restrict to detectable values
  X_det <- X[X > lod_dk]

  if (length(X_det) < 10) {
    return(tibble(
      p_detectable = NA_real_,
      p_t1 = NA_real_,
      p_t2 = NA_real_,
      p_t3 = NA_real_,
      PAF = NA_real_,
      AC = NA_real_,
      AD = NA_real_,
      YLD = NA_real_,
      YLL = NA_real_,
      DALY = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  # Proportion detectable in the full Danish population
  p_detectable <- mean(X > lod_dk)

  # Classify detectable Danish exposures using Korean tertile cutpoints
  grp <- case_when(
    X_det <= cut1 ~ "T1",
    X_det <= cut2 ~ "T2",
    TRUE ~ "T3"
  )

  p1 <- mean(grp == "T1")
  p2 <- mean(grp == "T2")
  p3 <- mean(grp == "T3")

  # Sample OR uncertainty from the reported 95% CI
  rr2 <- exp(rnorm(1, mean = log(OR_t2), sd = se_t2))
  rr3 <- exp(rnorm(1, mean = log(OR_t3), sd = se_t3))

  # Detectable-only categorical PAF
  PAF_det <- (p1 * (1 - 1) + p2 * (rr2 - 1) + p3 * (rr3 - 1)) /
             (p1 * 1 + p2 * rr2 + p3 * rr3)

  # Scale by the detectable fraction
  PAF <- p_detectable * PAF_det

  # Baseline incident diabetes cases
  base_cases <- if (baseline_uncertainty) {
    rpois(1, lambda = i_diabetes)
  } else {
    i_diabetes
  }

  # Attributable cases
  AC <- PAF * base_cases

  # YLD
  DW  <- rpert(1, DW_min, DW_mode, DW_max)
  YLD <- AC * D_years * DW

  # YLL
  AD  <- PAF * deaths
  YLL <- AD * seyll

  # DALY
  DALY <- YLD + YLL

  tibble(
    p_detectable = p_detectable,
    p_t1 = p1,
    p_t2 = p2,
    p_t3 = p3,
    PAF = PAF,
    AC = AC,
    AD = AD,
    YLD = YLD,
    YLL = YLL,
    DALY = DALY
  )
}
```

```{r}
run_mc_summary_daly_korea <- function(i_diabetes, meanlog_dk, sdlog_dk, lod_dk,
                                      D_years, deaths, seyll,
                                      DW_min, DW_mode, DW_max,
                                      OR_t2, OR_t3, se_t2, se_t3,
                                      cut1, cut2,
                                      nsim_outer = 3000,
                                      baseline_uncertainty = FALSE) {

  sims <- map_dfr(seq_len(nsim_outer), ~ run_mc_row_daly_korea(
    i_diabetes = i_diabetes,
    meanlog_dk = meanlog_dk,
    sdlog_dk = sdlog_dk,
    lod_dk = lod_dk,
    D_years = D_years,
    deaths = deaths,
    seyll = seyll,
    DW_min = DW_min,
    DW_mode = DW_mode,
    DW_max = DW_max,
    OR_t2 = OR_t2,
    OR_t3 = OR_t3,
    se_t2 = se_t2,
    se_t3 = se_t3,
    cut1 = cut1,
    cut2 = cut2,
    nsim = 10000,
    baseline_uncertainty = baseline_uncertainty
  ))

  tibble(
    p_detectable_med = median(sims$p_detectable, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_t1_med = median(sims$p_t1, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_t2_med = median(sims$p_t2, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_t3_med = median(sims$p_t3, na.rm = TRUE),

    PAF_med = median(sims$PAF, na.rm = TRUE),
    PAF_lo  = quantile(sims$PAF, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    PAF_hi  = quantile(sims$PAF, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),

    AC_med = median(sims$AC, na.rm = TRUE),
    AC_lo  = quantile(sims$AC, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    AC_hi  = quantile(sims$AC, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),

    AD_med = median(sims$AD, na.rm = TRUE),
    AD_lo  = quantile(sims$AD, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    AD_hi  = quantile(sims$AD, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),

    YLD_med = median(sims$YLD, na.rm = TRUE),
    YLD_lo  = quantile(sims$YLD, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    YLD_hi  = quantile(sims$YLD, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),

    YLL_med = median(sims$YLL, na.rm = TRUE),
    YLL_lo  = quantile(sims$YLL, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    YLL_hi  = quantile(sims$YLL, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),

    DALY_med = median(sims$DALY, na.rm = TRUE),
    DALY_lo  = quantile(sims$DALY, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    DALY_hi  = quantile(sims$DALY, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}
```

```{r}
results_daly_korea <- df %>%
  mutate(
    mc = pmap(
      list(i_diabetes, meanlog_dk, sdlog_dk, LOD, D_years, deaths, seyll),
      ~ run_mc_summary_daly_korea(
        i_diabetes = ..1,
        meanlog_dk = ..2,
        sdlog_dk = ..3,
        lod_dk = ..4,
        D_years = ..5,
        deaths = ..6,
        seyll = ..7,
        DW_min = DW_min,
        DW_mode = DW_mode,
        DW_max = DW_max,
        OR_t2 = OR_t2,
        OR_t3 = OR_t3,
        se_t2 = se_t2,
        se_t3 = se_t3,
        cut1 = cut1,
        cut2 = cut2,
        nsim_outer = 3000,
        baseline_uncertainty = FALSE
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  unnest(mc)

results_daly_korea
```

```{r}
cut1
cut2
```
